LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT, COUNSEL APPEARED. MATTER ARGUED. THE COURT FOUND SERVICE WAS MADE ON MR. HORN. COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: 1) DEFENDANT TO PAY $1,000 STATUTORY PENALTY FOR SETTING ASIDE THE JUDGMENT. 2) DEFENDANT WILL QUIT CLAIM TO THE JUDSON PROPERTY. 3) DEFENDANT TO DO VOLUNTARY ACCOUNTING BY SUPPLYING ALL DOCUMENTS REGARDING PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INCLUDING BANK RECORDS, WITHOUT NEED OF FORMAL DISCOVERY. 4) DEFENDANT IS PROHIBITED FROM TRANSFERRING ANY ASSETS OTHER THAN NORMAL BUSINESS. 5) DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF ATTORNEY FEE OF $15,000 AND REASONABLE COSTS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II/RS; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193 (503)

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT ; (& FURTHER RESPONSES) AND SANCTIONS REQUEST: SET FOR 1/5/05 AT 9:00 A.M. (NOT 9:30 AM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THREATT, HAROLD D HEARING SET FOR JAN-05-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, STEPHEN MACKOUSE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, SUBMITTED TO TENTATIVE RULING. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET #1 AND #2, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION SET #1 AND #2 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. IF COMPLETE ANSWERS HAVE ALREADY BEEN SERVED, DEFENDANT SHALL VERIFY THOSE RESPONSES. TO THE EXTENT AN ANSWER RESERVES THE RIGHT TO AMEND THE RESPONSE BECAUSE DISCOVERY IS ONGOING, THE RESPONSE IS ORDERED STRICKEN. THE RESPONSE MUST BE FULL AND COMPLETE AT THE TIME IT IS MADE. ANY AMENDMENTS MUST BE MADE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 2030(M). THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO ANY RESPONSES THAT ARE ALLEGED TO BE INADEQUATE BY PLAINTIFF. FAILURE TO RESPOND IN A TIMELY FASHION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $786.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
